accepted.reason: Symmetric recursive filter plus high-order interpolation stencil gives strong numeric loop kernels.
Fixed-size block allocator/free-list logic is a portable systems-style memory-management pattern.
Positive-min scan and Cholesky update/delete behavior are useful linear-algebra utility kernels.
Image crop-bound detection via directional scans is a compact branch-heavy array-processing example.
Radial distribution function computation with periodic boundary adjustments is a high-value simulation kernel.
PEM encode/decode and constant-time byte operations are practical security-oriented utility routines.
Geometric branching-growth node model has rich stochastic and geometric control flow.

skipped.reason: Thin wrapper around external KCP C API and callback plumbing; limited standalone portability.
Multiprocessing orchestration tightly coupled to project graph/path dependencies.
C++ backing-type wrapper with extension-specific pointer semantics; not a standalone conversion target.
